calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-29-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor (by Guardian).
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner: John F. Matau, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: John Christian Soriano, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: John Junior Matau.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-18-2007 Reset To Nov-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor (by Guardian).
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Petitioner: John F. Matau, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Johnny Sam Lio, was sworn and examined.
Akenese Jennings Lio and Nusipepa Lio, the Minor's biological parents are also present in court.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the Minor were made at the hearing.
Matter is continued to Nov. 29, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218. for Mr. Matau to file an Application for an appointment as Guardian ad litem.
